untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of news events and anchoring bias with drift magnitude measurement over custom 50-bar periods. No news event indicator, drift detection, or custom multi-bar standard deviation calculation available in allowed indicators. Approximated using ATR multiples as proxy for drift magnitude and SMA crossovers for directional drift, but core anchoring/news-reaction logic cannot be precisely captured.
translation_notes: Translated 'drift magnitude exceeds 1.5 standard deviations' to ATR_14 > 1.5 as volatility proxy. Translated 'price drifted in one direction' to close crossing SMA_50. RSI(14) 20-80 range preserved exactly. Stop loss and max hold period applied as specified. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect long/short context dependency in original signal.
